case_title: CACH, LLC VS. AURORA ROSARIO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-25-2013 CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ROSARIO, AURORA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-25-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-10-2013
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-13-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED MAY-10-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROSARIO, AURORA AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
